events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: PEX unsleeved through slab. This is a defect. PEX passing through concrete slab must be sleeved. IPC requires protection/sleeving for PEX through slabs. Manufacturer specs also require sleeving. This is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision: fail. Risk: medium/high. Work stage: rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80. Findings: PEX piping penetrates concrete slab without required protective sleeve. Actions: sleeve the PEX penetration or reroute. References: IPC, mfr specs.

    "Install an approved sleeve (rigid pipe or manufacturer-approved material) around the PEX where it penetrates the slab.",
